---
title: "Evaluation Knowledge Base"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.hero-panel}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Evaluation study notes</span>

# Evaluation Knowledge Base

A Quarto knowledge base for detailed, source-grounded notes on evaluation books and guidance. The first collection covers Funnell and Rogers' *Purposeful Program Theory* and is structured for adding further books later.

::: {.cta-row}
[Open Notes](notes/index.qmd){.cta-button}
[Purposeful Program Theory](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/index.qmd){.cta-button .secondary}
[Core Concepts](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/concepts.qmd){.cta-button .secondary}
[Export BibTeX](references.bib){.cta-button .secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Purposeful Program Theory](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/index.qmd)

Read chapter-by-chapter study notes on theories of change, logic models, and theory-based monitoring and evaluation.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/concepts.qmd)

Review the recurring concepts that connect the chapters: theory of change, theory of action, logic models, assumptions, and causal inference.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Knowledge map</span>

### [Chapter Map](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/chapter-map.qmd)

See the reading sequence and how chapter notes connect across the book.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Evaluation Practice Implications](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/evaluation-practice-implications.qmd)

Translate the book's arguments into practical evaluation design habits.
:::
:::

</div>
